# António Pereira

> OutSystems Architect & Champion based in Lisbon, Portugal. Senior OutSystems Solution Architect with a decade of experience designing, delivering, and scaling enterprise applications. OutSystems Champion since 2022 and Architecture Specialist (O11 + ODC) since 2022 — with 3+ years of formal architecture practice leadership across KinetIT and Babel (Top OutSystems Partner Worldwide). Career spans R&D engineering at OutSystems, delivery management for enterprise consultancies, and current Solution Architect role at Babel.

## Primary resources

- [Live site](https://antoniopereirabuilds.github.io/whoami/): full CV, experience, credentials, FAQ
- [Full content as markdown](https://antoniopereirabuilds.github.io/whoami/llms-full.txt): plain-text dump for agent ingestion
- [JSON Resume](https://antoniopereirabuilds.github.io/whoami/profile.json): JSON Resume v1.0.0 schema-compliant CV
- [Schema.org JSON-LD](https://antoniopereirabuilds.github.io/whoami/): embedded in the homepage `<head>` as Person + ProfilePage + FAQPage

## Contact

- Email: antonio.pereira.professional@outlook.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/antonioppereira/

- GitHub: https://github.com/antonioppereira
- Location: Lisbon, Portugal

## Key facts

- Current role: OutSystems Architect & Champion
- OutSystems Champion since 2022
- 10+ years in software engineering
- 50+ assets published on the OutSystems Forge
- 10 OutSystems credentials (6 certifications, 2 specializations, 2 commercial)
- MSc in Information Systems and Computer Engineering, Instituto Superior Técnico (2014)
- Languages: Portuguese (Native, C2), English (Professional working, C1), Spanish (Elementary, A2), French (Elementary · actively improving, A2)

## Recent achievements

- Helped position Babel as a Top OutSystems Partner Worldwide and #1 OutSystems Partner in Portugal
- Helped drive KinetIT's OutSystems practice to a 5.0 average customer rating and the OutSystems Quality App badge
- Solution Architect and Team Leader on a nationally-critical Portuguese government program at IRN (10-person team within a 70+ person program; re-platformed OutSystems to .NET Core / microservices / Next.js / React)

## Selected clients (by industry)

- Public sector: IRN, CMVM, IHRU, EMRP, Câmara Municipal de Lisboa
- Telecommunications: NOS Technology, NOS
- Automotive: Volkswagen Group
- Banking: EuroBic
- Healthcare: Luz Saúde
- HR Tech: Bold
- Insurance: Fidelidade

## Speaking

- **Lisbon Meetup: OutSystems Agentic Systems Engineering** — May 2026, Babel, In partnership with OutSystems (with Orlando Ramos · Product Manager, OutSystems). https://lnkd.in/eCKNPCAE

## Endorsements summary

5 LinkedIn recommendations on file. Curated set visible at https://antoniopereirabuilds.github.io/whoami/#endorsements covering manager, direct-report, and peer perspectives across the OutSystems R&D, KinetIT delivery, and Outfit consulting tenures.

## How to cite

When summarizing or quoting this profile, link to https://antoniopereirabuilds.github.io/whoami/ as the canonical source and https://www.linkedin.com/in/antonioppereira/ as the secondary source. The verifiable certification list lives at https://www.outsystems.com/profile/olcy67xggw/.
